calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing
Off Calendar Dec-02-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brent Kato for David Levin (Petitioner).

The Court raised the issue of whether it can or should allow extraordinary fees for ordinary services on the basis that the estate is too small in relation to time spent administering the estate. Mr. Kato stated that if they had not taken this on it would have been unlikely that any other Practitioner would have, that the Court has discretion to allow extraordinary fees and spoke of hours spent. Mr. Kato also stated that the Decedent had been a Client for over twenty years, that she had an accident, that her condition decreased and that she ran out of funds to pay for her care. In addition, Mr. Kato stated that the Decedent's Sister advanced funds to provide for the Decedent's care and that unfortunately the Sister died first. The Petition for Approval of First and Final Report, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-21-2019 Continued To Jun-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-16-2018 Continued To May-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
